=== SECTION: CHARGE ===

R v Ryan Marsh

Statement of Offence:
Drive motor vehicle with alcohol concentration above limit, contrary to section 5(1)(a) of the Road Traffic Act 1988.

Particulars of Offence:
On 6 June 2026 at Northgate Traffic drove a motor vehicle on a road after consuming alcohol in excess of the prescribed limit.
